_comment: Edit these titles and messages, then rebuild static pages (php artisan server-error-pages:build). Deploy via git (VPS) or FTP (shared hosting). Delete a code to fall back to the built-in default.

400.title: Bad request
400.message: The request could not be understood by the server.

401.title: Unauthorized
401.message: You need to sign in to view this page.

403.title: Forbidden
403.message: You do not have permission to view this page.

404.title: Page not found
404.message: The page you are looking for could not be found.

419.title: Page expired
419.message: Your session has expired. Please refresh and try again.

429.title: Too many requests
429.message: You have made too many requests. Please slow down and try again shortly.

500.title: Something went wrong
500.message: An unexpected error occurred on our side. We have been notified.

502.title: Bad gateway
502.message: The server received an invalid response upstream. Please try again shortly.

503.title: Be right back
503.message: We are briefly offline for maintenance. Please try again in a few minutes.

504.title: Gateway timeout
504.message: The server took too long to respond. Please try again shortly.

4xx.title: This page is unavailable
4xx.message: The page could not be displayed. Please check the address and try again.

5xx.title: Something went wrong
5xx.message: An unexpected error occurred on our side. Please try again shortly.
